ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator (PI) responsible for the experiment */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet provided to the animals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "litters" (
  "litter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each litter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the litter belongs to */,
  "litter_number" TEXT /* Litter number */,
  "gd0_weight" REAL /* Weight of the dam at day 0 of gestation */,
  "gd18_weight" REAL /* Weight of the dam at day 18 of gestation */,
  "gd_of_birth" INTEGER /* Day of birth */,
  "pups_born_alive" INTEGER /* Number of pups born alive */,
  "pups_dead_at_birth" INTEGER /* Number of pups dead at birth */,
  "pups_survive" INTEGER /* Number of pups that survived */,
  "dam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dam (female animal) that gave birth to the litter */,
  "sire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sire (male animal) that sired the litter */,
  "pups_born_total" INTEGER /* Total number of pups born (sum of pups born alive and dead at birth) */,
  "pups_survive_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of the pups (calculated as pups survive / pups born total) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the litter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("litter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_litters_dam_id FOREIGN KEY ("dam_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_litters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_litters_sire_id FOREIGN KEY ("sire_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, researcher, student) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or department the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level or permission group (e.g., admin, read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the animal */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the animal (male, female) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the animal */,
  "current_weight" REAL /* Current weight of the animal */,
  "genetic_info" TEXT /* Genetic information or markers of the animal */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the animal (e.g., healthy, under observation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_animals" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the animal in the experiment (e.g., dam, sire, offspring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal at the measurement date */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the animal at the measurement date */,
  "health_notes" TEXT /* Any health notes or observations at the measurement date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
